rows.label: tlk70000120_01_msg0001
rows.name:
Hail, and well met! I'm
Elba, the gallant Gulan
knight! At your service!

rows.label: tlk70000120_01_msg0002
rows.name:
Now, take a look at this weapon!
The chief recently gifted it me!

rows.label: tlk70000120_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Did you know? If you keep using a
weapon, the skills it can unleash
will grow too! That's important!

rows.label: tlk70000120_01_msg0004
rows.name:
Just you wait! I'll take good
care of this and train hard, and
soon I'll be a true knight!
